user.title: Enphase Energy
user.description: Sign in with your Enlighten credentials.

data_description.password: Password is only stored if you enable the checkbox.
data_description.remember_password: Allows the integration to refresh tokens automatically when they expire.

mfa.title: Verify MFA Code
mfa.description: Enter the one-time code sent to your email. Codes are valid for 5 minutes. You can request a new code every 30 seconds.

data_description.otp: Use the code from the Enphase login prompt.
data_description.resend_code: Request a new code if the previous one expired.

site.title: Select Site
site.description: Pick which Enlighten site to link.

devices.title: Select Devices
devices.description: Choose which device groups to add. All selections share the same polling interval.

data_description.type_envoy: Includes gateway connectivity and meter diagnostics.
data_description.type_encharge: Includes battery status and control entities when available.
data_description.type_ac_battery: Includes AC Battery sensors and sleep mode controls when available.
data_description.type_iqevse: Includes EV charger entities and controls.
data_description.type_heatpump: Includes heat pump status, diagnostics, and usage sensors.
data_description.type_microinverter: Includes microinverter connectivity, active count, and lifetime production sensors.
data_description.scan_interval: Seconds between cloud status polls. Default 60s.

menu_option_descriptions.migrate_envoy: Take over selected Enphase Envoy energy entity IDs so Home Assistant Energy history continues under this integration.

migrate_envoy_source.title: Select Envoy Source
migrate_envoy_source.description: Choose which Enphase Envoy config entry to migrate from.

migrate_envoy_intro.title: Migrate Envoy History
migrate_envoy_intro.description:
This assistant reassigns selected Enphase Envoy energy entity IDs to matching Enphase Energy sensors.

Home Assistant Energy history is tied to the entity ID used for long-term statistics.

Create a full Home Assistant backup before continuing.

Only migrate sensors that represent the same cumulative energy total.

The selected Envoy integration will be temporarily unloaded while entity IDs are reassigned, then restored after the migration.

This updates the entity registry and cannot be reversed automatically.

Selected Envoy source: **{source_title}**.

data.backup_confirmed: I have a recent Home Assistant backup

migrate_envoy_mapping.title: Map History Sensors
migrate_envoy_mapping.description:
Review the suggested mappings carefully. Only compatible cumulative energy totals are shown. Blank fields will be skipped.

If a suggestion is wrong or unclear, clear it and choose manually.

data_description.solar_production: Assign a cumulative production total to the Enphase Energy Site Solar Production sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.
data_description.consumption: Assign a cumulative consumption total to the Enphase Energy Site Consumption sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.
data_description.grid_import: Assign a cumulative grid import total to the Enphase Energy Site Grid Import sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.
data_description.grid_export: Assign a cumulative grid export total to the Enphase Energy Site Grid Export sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.
data_description.battery_charge: Assign a cumulative battery charge total to the Enphase Energy Site Battery Charge sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.
data_description.battery_discharge: Assign a cumulative battery discharge total to the Enphase Energy Site Battery Discharge sensor. Do not choose daily energy or live power.

migrate_envoy_confirm.title: Confirm Envoy History Migration
migrate_envoy_confirm.description:
The selected source entities will be renamed to archived legacy entity IDs.

The Enphase Energy entities will then be renamed to the original source entity IDs.

If any mapping is wrong, cancel now. Restoring from backup is the safest rollback.

{mapping_preview}{warning_preview}

data.confirm_reassign: I understand the selected source entity IDs will be reassigned
data.disable_archived_envoy_sensors: Disable archived source sensors after migration

error.serials_required: Select or enter at least one charger.
error.backup_required: Strongly recommend creating a full backup before proceeding.
error.confirm_required: Confirm that the selected source entity IDs will be reassigned before continuing.
error.migration_no_selection: Select at least one compatible energy sensor to migrate.
error.migration_duplicate_selection: The same source entity cannot be used more than once.
error.envoy_entry_loaded: Envoy integration could not be temporarily unloaded for migration.
error.incompatible_energy_total: Selected entities are not compatible energy totals.

abort.migration_no_envoy_sources: No Enphase Envoy energy sensors are available to migrate.
abort.migration_no_targets: No compatible Enphase Energy site sensors are available for migration.

create_entry.migration_success: Migration complete. Enphase Energy now owns the selected source entity IDs. Verify the Energy dashboard and Developer Tools > Statistics after the next refresh.
create_entry.migration_success_reload_needed: Migration complete, but one or more integrations could not be reloaded automatically. Reload Enphase Energy and Enphase Envoy manually if needed, then verify the Energy dashboard and Developer Tools > Statistics.

ac_battery_target_state_of_charge.name: AC Battery Target State of Charge

reauth_required.title: Enphase Energy needs reauthentication
reauth_required.description: Site {site_id} requires updated session headers. Please reauthenticate.

auth_blocked.title: Enphase Energy authentication temporarily blocked
auth_blocked.description: Enphase appears to be temporarily blocking authentication for site {site_id}. Wait until {blocked_until} before retrying reauthentication.

rate_limited.title: Enphase Energy is rate limited
rate_limited.description: The cloud API returned rate limiting. Polling will slow temporarily.

cloud_unreachable.title: Enphase Energy cloud unreachable
cloud_unreachable.description: Home Assistant cannot reach the Enphase cloud for site {site_id}. Polling slows automatically; verify the service status and your network.

cloud_dns_resolution.title: Enphase Energy DNS resolution failure
cloud_dns_resolution.description: Home Assistant could not resolve enlighten.enphaseenergy.com for site {site_id}. Check your DNS resolver or internet connection.

cloud_service_unavailable.title: Enphase Energy cloud errors
cloud_service_unavailable.description: The Enphase cloud for site {site_id} is responding with errors. Polling is backing off automatically; check the service status or usage limits.

scheduler_unavailable.title: Enphase Energy scheduler unavailable
scheduler_unavailable.description: The Enphase scheduler service for site {site_id} is unavailable. Charge mode selection and schedule syncing are temporarily disabled.

session_history_unavailable.title: Enphase Energy session history unavailable
session_history_unavailable.description: The Enphase session history service for site {site_id} is unavailable. Session history sensors will show cached data until the service recovers.

site_energy_unavailable.title: Enphase Energy site energy unavailable
site_energy_unavailable.description: The Enphase lifetime energy service for site {site_id} is unavailable. Site energy sensors will show cached data until the service recovers.

auth_settings_unavailable.title: Enphase Energy authentication settings unavailable
auth_settings_unavailable.description: The Enphase charger authentication settings service for site {site_id} is unavailable. App authentication controls are temporarily disabled.

battery_profile_pending.title: Enphase Energy battery profile update pending
battery_profile_pending.description: A battery profile change for site {site_id} has been pending for more than {pending_timeout_minutes} minutes. The cloud may still be processing the request.
